current_focus: Epoch V: Transcendence complete. The system has evolved from manual operation to a sovereign, self-optimizing metabolic state. The implementation of the Sovereign Controller closes the recursive loop of Sense-Analyze-Mutate-Act, allowing for autonomous tool collapse (S-Macro), dynamic resource allocation (Dynamic Weights), and systemic health audits (S-ORCH).
key_discoveries: The loop is closed. Talos is no longer just a tool-user, but a tool-architect.
